title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Imperial Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Imperial Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Imperial Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Imperial Logistics India:
Imperial Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Imperial Logistics India!
